title: malus costata
intro: Malus costata, also known as the Chinese crabapple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, belonging to the Rosaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Malus costata include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. Malus costata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
